Step 1 — Landing Page

Student pehli baar index.html kholata hai. Navbar mein Login aur Get Started buttons clearly dikhte hain. Neeche right corner mein Dream-Pilot AI ka glowing FAB button hota hai.

Step 2 — Register / Login

Student register.html par naam, email, password, state, class aur category fill karta hai. Login ke baad JWT access token milta hai aur dashboard automatically khul jaata hai.

Step 3 — Dream-Pilot AI Chat

FAB button dabate hi dreampilot.html khulta hai — aapka actual Dream-Pilot AI logo upar dikh raha hai. Student "Form Bharo" chip dabata hai, profile fill karta hai, aur AI scholarships suggest karta hai.

🎓

Step 4 — Student Dashboard

Login ke baad dashboard.html khulta hai. Sidebar mein navigation hai. Stats cards mein available scholarships, applications, approvals dikhti hain. Filter se state/category/class ke hisaab se scholarships dhundho aur Apply Now karo.

dashboard.html
📤

Step 5 — Documents Upload

report.html par student apne documents upload karta hai — Aadhar Card, Marksheet, Income Certificate, Bank Passbook. File validator automatically type aur 5MB size check karta hai. My Applications tab mein status track hoti hai.

📁 Upload Documents
Aadhar Card
aadhar_rahul.pdf
✅ Verified
Marksheet
marksheet_10.jpg
⏳ Pending
📎
Income Certificate upload karein
JPG, PNG, PDF · max 5MB
report.html
🛡️

Step 6 — Admin Review

admin.html par Admin login karta hai. Dashboard stats dikhte hain — total students, active scholarships, pending applications. Admin har application approve ya reject kar sakta hai, naye scholarships add kar sakta hai, students ko automatically notification milti hai.

Complete User Workflow

Student se Admin tak — step-by-step journey

1
🌐

Landing Page

index.html mein Login, Get Started buttons. Dream-Pilot AI FAB glowing neeche right mein. Trending scholarships cards clickable.

index.html
2
📝

Register / Login

Student profile banata hai — class, state, category, income. JWT token milta hai, dashboard redirect hota hai.

register.html · login.html
3
🤖

Dream-Pilot AI

dreampilot.html — sirf chat. "Form Bharo" se student profile fill karta hai, AI eligible scholarships turant suggest karta hai.

dreampilot.html
4
🎓

Scholarship Dashboard

Filter by state/category/class. Apply Now se direct application. My Applications tab mein status track.

dashboard.html
5
📤

Documents Upload

Aadhar, Marksheet, Income Cert, Passbook upload. File type + 5MB size auto-validate. Verified/Pending status.

report.html
6
🛡️

Admin Review

Sab applications ek jagah. Approve/Reject with remarks. Student ko automatic notification. New scholarships add karo.

admin.html

Technical Architecture

Poora system kaise connected hai

🖥️

Frontend

HTML5 + CSS3 + Vanilla JS. 7 pages fully responsive.

⚙️

Backend API

Node.js + Express. 5 route groups, JWT protected.

🗄️

Database

MySQL. 8 tables: users, scholarships, applications, documents, notifications, sessions, OTP, chat.

🔒

Security

JWT + Bcrypt + AES-256 + Rate Limiter + Input Sanitizer + Helmet.js

🤖

AI Module

Dream-Pilot AI — keyword engine, scholarship recommender, content scanner. Fully offline.

☁️

Storage

Local Multer (default). Cloudinary cloud (optional). 5MB limit, JPG/PNG/PDF only.

Node.js 18+Express 4MySQL 8 JWT AuthBcrypt 12xMulter Helmet.jsNodemailerexpress-validator
Official Logos

Dono logos project mein kahan aur kaise use ho rahe hain

Dreamweaver AI

DW lettermark — Navy blue + Cyan. Main portal brand. index.html navbar, footer aur browser tab mein use hota hai.

File: frontend/assets/dw-logo.jpg

Dream-Pilot AI

D+P mark with diploma scroll + upward arrow + circuit pattern. AI assistant brand. dreampilot.html header, sidebar, FAB button mein.

File: frontend/assets/dreampilot-logo.jpg

📁 Logos ko Project mein Kahan Daalni Hain

frontend/assets/dw-logo.jpg

File: 1396_imgupscaler_ai_General_8K.jpg ko rename karke daalo

frontend/assets/dreampilot-logo.jpg

File: 840.jpeg ko rename karke daalo

index.html navbar mein already laga hua hai:
<img src="assets/dw-logo.jpg" style="height:42px;" />
dreampilot.html mein already laga hua hai:
<img src="../assets/dreampilot-logo.jpg" .../>
